# R Youth Homelessness Analyzer *(RYHA)*

The goal of **ryha** is to provide a web-based application for in-depth,
user-friendly provision & consumption of Youth Homelessness data across
the State of Ohio.

## Installation

This Shiny application is built using the [{golem}
framework](https://thinkr-open.github.io/golem/), which means that this
app is actually an *R package*.

You can install **ryha** with:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("COHHIO/ryha")
```

## Running the App

Before launching the app:

- You must determine the environment that will be used to create the
  data model. This is accomplished by setting `APP_BACKEND`
  environmental variable. Valid options are:

  - `prod`, which connects to the database in production
  - `dev`, which connects to an internal database that is set up using
    dev containers. Check [Development
    Environment](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/articles/dev-environment/dev-environment.html)
    article to learn how to set it up.
  - `file`, which reads a provided `.rds` data model object and does not
    require any database connection.

- If you are connecting to a database (i.e. `APP_BACKEND=prod` or
  `APP_BACKEND=dev`) you must have the following additional
  configuration to be able to upload data to the app and write to the
  database:

  - Environment Variable (for *uploading* data to the app):

    - `UPLOAD_PWD`: sets the password required to upload data to the
      database.

  - Hash keys developed for encrypting the data during the writing
    process (stored at the root of the directory, needed for *writing
    to* the database)

- If you are connecting to the database in production
  (i.e. `APP_BACKEND=prod`) you must have the following additional
  configurations set to interact with the database:

  - Environment Variables:

    - `DB_NAME`: database name. It specifies the name of the specific
      database within the PostgreSQL server to which you want to
      connect.
    - `DB_HOST`: host address of the PostgreSQL server. In our case, it
      will be a particular domain name (e.g. db.example.com).
    - `DB_PORT`: port number on which the PostgreSQL server is listening
      for connections.
    - `DB_USER`: username used to authenticate with the PostgreSQL
      server. The user must have the necessary permissions to connect to
      the specified database.
    - `DB_PWD`: password associated with the specified user account. It
      is used for authentication purposes to ensure that the connection
      is secure.

Environmental variables should be stored in a `.Renviron` file located
at the root of the directory.

After installing the package, you can launch the app using the package’s
[`run_app()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/run_app.md)
function.

``` r

ryha::run_app()
```

# Package index

## Chart Functions

- [`add_stacked_bar_tooltip()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/add_stacked_bar_tooltip.md)
  : Add tooltip to stacked bar chart
- [`bar_chart()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/bar_chart.md)
  : Generate a bar chart using echarts4r
- [`prepare_sankey_data()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/prepare_sankey_data.md)
  : Prepare data for a Sankey chart
- [`sankey_chart()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/sankey_chart.md)
  : Generate a Sankey chart using echarts4r

## Package Datasets

- [`CountExchangeForSexCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/CountExchangeForSexCodes.md)
  : CountExchangeForSex Codes
- [`CountyCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/CountyCodes.md)
  : CountyCodes Codes
- [`DataCollectionStageCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/DataCollectionStageCodes.md)
  : DataCollectionStage Codes
- [`DisabilityTypeCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/DisabilityTypeCodes.md)
  : DisabilityType Codes
- [`DOBDataQualityCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/DOBDataQualityCodes.md)
  : DOB Data Quality Codes
- [`EmploymentTypeCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/EmploymentTypeCodes.md)
  : EmploymentType Codes
- [`HealthStatusCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/HealthStatusCodes.md)
  : HealthStatus Codes
- [`HMISmetadata`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/HMISmetadata.md)
  : HMISmetadata
- [`LastGradeCompletedCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/LastGradeCompletedCodes.md)
  : LastGradeCompleted Codes
- [`LengthOfStayCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/LengthOfStayCodes.md)
  : LengthOfStay Codes
- [`LivingCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/LivingCodes.md)
  : Living Codes
- [`MonthsHomelessPastThreeYearsCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/MonthsHomelessPastThreeYearsCodes.md)
  : MonthsHomelessPastThreeYears Codes
- [`NotEmployedReasonCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/NotEmployedReasonCodes.md)
  : NotEmployedReason Codes
- [`NoYesCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/NoYesCodes.md)
  : NoYes Codes
- [`NoYesMissingCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/NoYesMissingCodes.md)
  : NoYesMissing Codes
- [`NoYesReasonsForMissingDataCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/NoYesReasonsForMissingDataCodes.md)
  : NoYesReasonsForMissingData Codes
- [`PATHReferralOutcomeCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/PATHReferralOutcomeCodes.md)
  : PATHReferralOutcome Codes
- [`ProjectCompletionStatusCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/ProjectCompletionStatusCodes.md)
  : ProjectCompletionStatus Codes
- [`ProjectTypeCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/ProjectTypeCodes.md)
  : ProjectType Codes
- [`RaceGenderNoneCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/RaceGenderNoneCodes.md)
  : RaceGenderNone Codes
- [`ReasonNotInsuredCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/ReasonNotInsuredCodes.md)
  : ReasonNotInsured Codes
- [`ReferralSourceCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/ReferralSourceCodes.md)
  : ReferralSource Codes
- [`RelationshipToHoHCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/RelationshipToHoHCodes.md)
  : RelationshipToHoH Codes
- [`RHYNumberOfYearsCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/RHYNumberOfYearsCodes.md)
  : RHYNumberOfYears Codes
- [`SchoolStatusCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/SchoolStatusCodes.md)
  : SchoolStatus Codes
- [`ServiceCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/ServiceCodes.md)
  : Service Codes
- [`SexCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/SexCodes.md) :
  Sex Codes
- [`SSNDataQualityCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/SSNDataQualityCodes.md)
  : SSNDataQuality Codes
- [`SubstanceUseDisorderCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/SubstanceUseDisorderCodes.md)
  : SubstanceUseDisorder Codes
- [`TimesHomelessPastThreeYearsCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/TimesHomelessPastThreeYearsCodes.md)
  : TimesHomelessPastThreeYears Codes
- [`WhenDVOccurredCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/WhenDVOccurredCodes.md)
  : WhenDVOccurred Codes
- [`WorkerResponseCodes`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/WorkerResponseCodes.md)
  : WorkerResponse Codes

## Data Management Functions

- [`connect_to_db()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/connect_to_db.md)
  : Connect to PostgreSQL Database
- [`convert_to_ordered_factor()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/convert_to_ordered_factor.md)
  : Convert vector to ordered factor
- [`create_dm()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/create_dm.md)
  : Create the data model
- [`delete_from_db()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/delete_from_db.md)
  : Delete records from a database
- [`read_data_from_table()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_data_from_table.md)
  : Read specific columns from database table
- [`send_to_db()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/send_to_db.md)
  : Send data to a database
- [`spinner_message()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/spinner_message.md)
  : Create message with spinner

## Data Processing Functions

- [`validate_file_names()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/validate_file_names.md)
  : Ensure All HMIS Data was Uploaded
- [`find_file()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/find_file.md)
  : Find the complete filepath of a certain .csv file
- [`hash()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/hash.md) : Hash a
  value with a key
- [`prep_tables()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/prep_tables.md)
  : Prepare data for database tasks
- [`process_data()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/process_data.md)
  : Process HMIS Data
- [`filter_most_recent_enrollment_per_group()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/filter_most_recent_enrollment_per_group.md)
  : Filter most recent enrollment per group
- [`filter_most_recent_data_per_enrollment()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/filter_most_recent_data_per_enrollment.md)
  : Filter most recent data per enrollment
- [`filter_data()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/filter_data.md)
  : Filter data based on clients and validate

## Ingest Functions

- [`validate_colnames()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/validate_colnames.md)
  : Validate colnames
- [`validate_file_data()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/validate_file_data.md)
  : Validate file data
- [`read_benefits()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_benefits.md)
  : Ingest "IncomeBenefits.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "BENEFITS"
  database table
- [`read_client()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_client.md)
  : Ingest "Client.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "CLIENT" database
  table
- [`read_disabilities()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_disabilities.md)
  : Ingest "Disabilities.csv" file and perform ETL prep for
  "DISABILITIES" database table
- [`read_domestic_violence()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_domestic_violence.md)
  : Ingest "HealthAndDV.csv" file and perform ETL prep for
  "DOMESTIC_VIOLENCE" database table
- [`read_education()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_education.md)
  : Ingest "EmploymentEducation.csv" file and perform ETL prep for
  "EDUCATION" database table
- [`read_employment()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_employment.md)
  : Ingest "EmploymentEducation.csv" file and perform ETL prep for
  "EMPLOYMENT" database table
- [`read_enrollment()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_enrollment.md)
  : Ingest "Enrollment.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "ENROLLMENT"
  database table
- [`read_exit()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_exit.md)
  : Ingest "Exit.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "EXIT" database
  table
- [`read_export()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_export.md)
  : Ingest "Export.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "PROJECT" and
  "SUBMISSION" database tables
- [`read_funder()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_funder.md)
  : Ingest "Funder.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "FUNDER" database
  table
- [`read_health()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_health.md)
  : Ingest "HealthAndDV.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "HEALTH"
  database table
- [`read_income()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_income.md)
  : Ingest "IncomeBenefits.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "INCOME"
  database table
- [`read_living()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_living.md)
  : Ingest "CurrentLivingSituation.csv" file and perform ETL prep for
  "LIVING" database table
- [`read_organization()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_organization.md)
  : Ingest "Organization.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "PROJECT"
  database table
- [`read_project()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_project.md)
  : Ingest "Project.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "PROJECT"
  database table
- [`read_project_coc()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_project_coc.md)
  : Ingest "ProjectCoC.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "PROJECT COC"
  database table
- [`read_services()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/read_services.md)
  : Ingest "Services.csv" file and perform ETL prep for "SERVICES"
  database table

## UI Utils Functions

- [`custom_card()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/custom_card.md)
  : Create a custom card
- [`custom_pickerInput()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/custom_pickerInput.md)
  : Create a custom pickerInput
- [`get_nav_panel_title()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/get_nav_panel_title.md)
  : Create a navigation panel title with an icon
- [`link_section()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/link_section.md)
  : Create span with hyperlink to the HMIS Data Standards Manual
- [`link_data_standards_manual()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/link_data_standards_manual.md)
  : Create a Link to the HMIS Data Standards Manual
- [`validate_data()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/validate_data.md)
  : Validate data
- [`with_popover()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/with_popover.md)
  : Add custom Bootstrap popover

## Other Functions

- [`run_app()`](https://cohhio.github.io/ryha/reference/run_app.md) :
  Run the Shiny Application
